name: ai-video-captions
description: Free, open-source AI video caption generator

scripts.setup: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install && DATABASE_URL=file:./data/captions.db npx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./data/captions.db npx prisma db push
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && DATABASE_URL=file:./data/captions.db npm run dev
scripts.test: cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. python -m pytest tests/ -v
